column2: "metric_description": "LLM-as-judge metric measuring relevancy to the user story."
column4:
I want to have a one-paragraph summary of the project requirements so that I can quickly understand the overall project scope and objectives.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The document is a one-paragraph summary.
- It clearly outlines the project's main objectives.
- It mentions the key functionalities of the industrial data platform.
- It is concise and easily understandable."
column5: "candidate": "The Industrial Data Platform is designed to collect and process industrial sensor data
column8: and a web dashboard. It integrates with SCADA systems
column10: and other data sources. The platform can be run in interactive or batch mode and includes features like sensor monitoring."
